name: demoCORS
description: Interactive demo project for learning and teaching CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) — browser security, preflight requests, and response headers.
author: Karan

scripts.start: concurrently -n frontend,no-cors,with-cors -c blue,red,green "node frontend-server.js" "node server-no-cors.js" "node server-with-cors.js"
